title: Manufacturing Engineer - NTPC Capital India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - NTPC Capital India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, NTPC Capital India in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About NTPC Capital India:
NTPC Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NTPC Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
